compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<quitting notice>> email to boss, no commas, formal tone, no personal details, concise, no salutations or sign-offs
response:
<<Quitting Notice>>

This email serves as formal notification of my resignation. My last day of employment will be [Date].

Please advise on the transition process.

I will ensure all my responsibilities are concluded appropriately.
